a:r.a:t: 1. We will use several assets and sources of insight to evaluate opportunities
Benchmark sales and marketing performance against our proprietary distribution KPIs to access efficiency, productivity, and cost, coverage
Bring expertise from former sales and commercial leaders at leading distribution companies to share expertise
to identify key opportunities across churn, whitespace, cross-selling, pricing, etc.
Implement our proprietary sales survey to assess commercial
perceived strengths, pain points and opportunities
McKinsey’s proprietary assets will help drive deep insights and high impact opportunities
